headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk if sector sentiment worsens, but currently non-material. — Adani's financial strain may slow India's green energy progress, but immediate impact on Adani Power is limited.
what_matters: BRSR, TCFD, GRI frameworks triggered for disclosure obligations; no regulatory deadlines or penalties currently active.
No P/E compression or margin erosion at present; revenue at risk is not material.
Potential for marginal increase in cost of capital (+20-40bps) if regulatory scrutiny escalates, but no current bond spread movement or FII outflow.
